title: WorkflowSpec
description: A directed acyclic graph (DAG) of WorkflowNodes connected by WorkflowEdges, with triggers and policy bindings.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

nodes.description: The processing nodes of the DAG.

edges.description: The directed dependency edges connecting nodes in the DAG.

triggers.description: How this workflow is activated (schedule, event, or manual).

policyBindings.description: Policies that must be satisfied before this workflow may execute.
